german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with over half of positions accessible without German proficiency.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Most Prevalent
seniority.subtitle: Mid-level positions account for 37% of the workforce, while senior roles make up 45%.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Mixed Preferences
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating uncertainty in flexibility and remote options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 34% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
